creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Since you're using -CURRENT I'm afraid this will need a bit more help 
from your side than just a report. :-/ 

Looking at the sources, the code in question reads 

__mf_register (stdin,  sizeof (*stdin),  __MF_TYPE_STATIC, "stdin"); 
__mf_register (stdout, sizeof (*stdout), __MF_TYPE_STATIC, "stdout"); 
__mf_register (stderr, sizeof (*stderr), __MF_TYPE_STATIC, "stderr"); 

so I assume the problem is that stdin and friends are only typed as 
extern, their full definition not being available at this point yet. 

Can you find out where the full definition would be available and 
try what happens if you #include the respective file at the top of 
mf-runtime.c (as the last entry there)?
